'''Haj Shipping Lines''' was a starline transportation service owned by the [[Haj family]]. Two of the [[Starship/Legends|ship]]s they owned were the ''[[Star of Empire]]'' and its sister ship, ''[[Queen of Empire]]''. The company stayed neutral in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], courting both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], allowing it to prosper from multiple sources.

Stops for Haj [[Luxury liner/Legends|liner]]s included [[Velga Prime]] and [[Dorlon II]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
